locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

locations.name: 印度尼西亚

relations.subject: Spotted harrier
relations.evidence: It can be most commonly found in native grassland however it is also seen in agricultural land and inland wetlands for the purpose of foraging. thumb|Subadult flying at Pilbara, Western Australia, Australia
